title: poa pratensis var. alpestris
intro: Poa pratensis var. alpestris, also known as alpine meadow grass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass Poa pratensis, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Poa pratensis var. alpestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
